subjects.financialEntryAdded: New Accounting Entry Regarding Your Dossier

dossierCreated.confirmation: We confirm the opening of your Dossier.
dossierCreated.footer: We remain at your disposal for any questions.

dossierStatusChanged.intro: We inform you that the status of your Dossier has changed.
dossierStatusChanged.footer: For any questions, do not hesitate to contact us.

statusExplanations.Closed: Your Dossier is now closed. All elements of the lawsuit have been processed.
statusExplanations.Suspended: Your Dossier is temporarily suspended due to circumstances requiring a pause in processing.
statusExplanations.OpenAfterReopening: Your Dossier has been reopened for processing following new developments.
statusExplanations.Open: Your Dossier is now active and under processing.

dossierDeadlineChanged.intro: We inform you of a deadline change concerning your Dossier.

impactNotes.significant: represents a significant change in your Dossier's schedule
impactNotes.moderate: may impact the processing schedule of your Dossier

dossierDeadlineChanged.footer: For any questions, do not hesitate to contact us.

lawsuitCreated.confirmation: We confirm the opening of a new lawsuit concerning you.
lawsuitCreated.footer: We will keep you informed of each step.

lawsuitStatusChanged.intro: We inform you of a development concerning your lawsuit.
lawsuitStatusChanged.footer: We remain at your disposal for any additional information.

statusExplanations.Closed: Your lawsuit is now closed. A final decision has been rendered.
statusExplanations.Suspended: Your lawsuit has been suspended by the court. We will inform you of the resumption of proceedings.

lawsuitHearingChanged.intro: We inform you of a change concerning your next hearing.
lawsuitHearingChanged.footer:
Please note this change and organize accordingly.

For any questions, do not hesitate to contact us.

sessionScheduled.intro: A hearing has been scheduled for your Dossier.
sessionScheduled.footer: We will keep you informed of any developments.

sessionDateChanged.intro: We inform you of a change concerning your next hearing.
sessionDateChanged.footer:
Please note this change and organize accordingly.

For any questions, do not hesitate to contact us.

sessionCancelled.intro: We inform you of the cancellation of the scheduled hearing.
sessionCancelled.footer: A new date will be communicated as soon as possible.

financialEntryAdded.intro: A new accounting entry has been recorded.
